description: Source provenance for the x2t WASM build. Vanilla ONLYOFFICE/core v9.3.0.140 can now be used directly — 26 patches + 6 stubs produce bit-identical x2t.wasm (verified 2026-05-30).

primary.note: Vanilla core + patches/stubs is now the PRIMARY build source. CryptPad fork no longer required.

historical.note: Used for initial adaptation and as the reference for patch generation.

stubs.description: Empty stub implementations replacing Qt-dependent code

mustPortPatches.description: Build config, linker, and behavioral changes required for WASM compilation

patchSystem.note: apply-all.sh auto-discovers all .patch files — no manual mapping needed

mustPort.description: Essential for WASM compilation — empty stubs, build config, linker fixes

optionalTrim.description: Removed functionality — not needed for x2t-only WASM. Dockerfile --target output already skips affected stages.

skip.description: Test file rename — no functional impact

riskNeedsReview.description: Behavioral changes — should be reviewed before adopting in production

unclassifiedBuildConfig.description: Additional build configuration files, inline edits in Dockerfile (3 sed commands), and other non-source changes

stubFiles.description: Empty/replacement implementations that remove Qt, docbuilder, and platform dependencies. These are the primary reason vanilla core cannot build.

reproducibility.x2t.js: non-deterministic (Emscripten JS glue — timestamps, random IDs). Functionally equivalent.
reproducibility.buildTime: ~1-2h (28 library stages + Emscripten link), ~1min with warm Docker cache
